name: core-ai-pm-workflow
description: 10 AI-powered skills for Product Managers — write docs, build decks, research competitors, review strategy, and track your work

plugins.name: calendar
plugins.author: David Elgut
plugins.description: Fetch and display Google Calendar events — today's schedule, specific dates, or multi-day views

plugins.name: gdocs-share
plugins.author: David Elgut
plugins.description: Read, write, and sync Google Docs via OAuth — convert between markdown and Google Docs bidirectionally

plugins.name: deep-dive
plugins.author: David Elgut
plugins.description: Research any GitHub repo and generate a polished HTML deep-dive reference document

plugins.name: competitor-research
plugins.author: David Elgut
plugins.description: Structured competitive analysis from web search, GitHub repos, and public data

plugins.name: doc-writer
plugins.author: David Elgut
plugins.description: Write PM documents in 7 formats — one-pagers, PRFAQs, PRDs, epics, and GitHub issues with auto-detected format

plugins.name: doc-reviewer
plugins.author: David Elgut
plugins.description: Review documents with CTO and GM persona feedback based on Kent Beck's 3X framework

plugins.name: html-reference-page
plugins.author: David Elgut
plugins.description: Generate polished, self-contained HTML reference pages with a professional dark theme

plugins.name: presentation
plugins.author: David Elgut
plugins.description: Generate interactive HTML slide deck presentations with navigation, fullscreen, and print-to-PDF

plugins.name: morning-standup
plugins.author: David Elgut
plugins.description: Daily metric check-in with configurable alerts — works with any SQL-compatible data source

plugins.name: my-initiatives
plugins.author: David Elgut
plugins.description: Track GitHub issues across repos and sync to your task list with configurable labels and categories
